character.name: Full-body portrait of a single
character.prompt: Full-body portrait of a single Janissary cavalry scout on a flat warm-grey background, studio lighting with no environment. Male, late 20s, lean sinewy build — a rider's body, long-limbed and narrow-hipped — dark olive complexion with high color in the cheeks, Tatar or Crimean origin with epicanthic folds, coal-black eyes, a thin disciplined mustache, clean-shaven chin, black hair oiled back beneath a low fur-trimmed kalpak cap rather than the standard bork headdress. Wearing a short dark brown leather riding coat over a faded yellow wool kaftan, a wide leather sword belt slung diagonally across the chest, tight grey sirwal trousers reinforced with leather inner-thigh patches, tall black riding boots with iron spurs. His right hand rests on the pommel of a long curved kilij saber sheathed at his left hip — a slender blade with a pronounced yelman (broadened tip) visible at the scabbard mouth, the hilt wrapped in dark sharkskin with brass crossguard and a distinctive pistol-shaped pommel. A flintlock pistol is tucked into his sash. Expression sharp, restless, the distant stare of a man who has spent weeks riding ahead of the main column. Symmetrical A-pose, three-point neutral light, no cast shadow. Hyperrealistic, 8K, clean character sheet, no background, no environment.
